title: Khaaza'k
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Khaaza'k''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] that ferried the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Maximus]]'' after it was [[Defense of the Anvil|crippled]] and abandoned before its destruction.

The Khaaza'k and other transports carrying crew from the ''Maximus'' docked with the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] [[Anvil (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Anvil'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
